mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "TB_JOB_BOOKMARK" ( "JOB_NUM", "MEMBER_NUM", "CREATE_DATE" ) VALUES ( #{jobNum}, #{memberNum}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT ("JOB_NUM", "MEMBER_NUM") DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT B."BOOKMARK_NUM", B."JOB_NUM", B."MEMBER_NUM", B."CREATE_DATE", J."JOB_TITLE", J."JOB_CATEGORY", J."JOB_TYPE", J."JOB_LOCATION", J."JOB_PAY", J."JOB_WORK_DAY", J."JOB_WORK_TIME", J."JOB_MAX_MEMBER", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_JOB_APPLY" A WHERE A."JOB_NUM" = J."JOB_NUM" AND A."APPLY_STATUS" = 'ACCEPT' ) AS "CURRENT_APPLY_MEMBER", M."MEMBER_NAME", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME" FROM "TB_JOB_BOOKMARK" B INNER JOIN "TB_JOB" J ON B."JOB_NUM" = J."JOB_NUM" LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON J."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM" LEFT JOIN "TB_JOB_FILE" F ON J."JOB_NUM" = F."JOB_NUM" WHERE B."MEMBER_NUM" = #{memberNum} ORDER BY B."BOOKMARK_NUM" DESC
